input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.3.4
            TITLE: repeated operation of the switch must not reset or restore power

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.3.4: Repeated operation of the switch must not reset or restore power
T.3.3.4 Repeated operation of the switch must not reset or restore power

final_answer: Repeated operation of the switch must not reset or restore power
